mapper.select: SELECT image "image" FROM places_images WHERE place_id=#{placeId} ORDER BY image_num
SELECT image "image" FROM places_images WHERE place_id=#{placeId} AND image_num=1
SELECT lat "lat", lng "lng" FROM places WHERE place_id=#{placeId}
SELECT arr_place_id FROM boards WHERE bno=#{bno}

SELECT p.name "name",(SELECT NVL(AVG(rating),0) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id) "avgRating", p.category "category", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id) "reviewCnt", p.address "address", p.business_hours "businessHours", p.website_url "websiteUrl", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_places WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND place_id = #{placeId}) "isLiked", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=0) "rating0", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=1) "rating1", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=2) "rating2", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=3) "rating3", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=4) "rating4", (SELECT count(*) FROM reviews r WHERE p.place_id = r.place_id AND rating=5) "rating5" FROM places p WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO like_places(member_id, place_id, like_time) VALUES(#{memberId},#{placeId},SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_places WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT r.review_idx "reviewIdx", r.content "content", r.rating "rating", r.final_date "finalDate", r.image "image", m.nick_name "nickName", m.member_id "memberId", m.profile_img "profileImg" FROM reviews r INNER JOIN members m ON r.user_id = m.member_id WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.review_idx DESC) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews(review_idx, user_id, place_id, content, rating, final_date, image) VALUES(seq_reviews.nextval, #{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{content}, #{rating}, SYSDATE, #{image})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, image = #{image} WHERE review_idx = #{reviewIdx} AND user_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reviews WHERE review_idx = #{reviewIdx} AND user_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places (place_id, name, category, address, lat, lng, website_url, business_hours) VALUES (#{placeId},#{name},#{category},#{address},#{lat},#{lng},#{websiteUrl}, #{businessHours})
INSERT INTO places_images (place_id, image, image_num) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{img}, #{imageNum})
mapper.select: SELECT address FROM places WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM places WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
